title: prunus × effusa
intro: Prunus × effusa, also known as the double-flowered plum, is a deciduous shrub or small tree that is a hybrid of Prunus domestica and Prunus cerasifera. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Prunus × effusa include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function, as well as exhibiting potential anti-cancer properties. Prunus × effusa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, and it is also used in traditional cooking and baking, particularly in jams and preserves.
